lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਰੋਗੁ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin satigur rog kateh na jaavai |3|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the disease is never cured. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗ ਬੰਧ ਰਹਨੁ ਰਤੀ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: rog bandh rehan ratee na paavai |
lines.english: Entangled in disease, they cannot stay still, even for an instant.
Says Nanak, the Guru cures him of the disease. ||4||7||20||
When the Supreme Lord God grants His Mercy,
He grabs hold of the mortal's arm, and pulls him up and out of the disease.
Reaching the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the mortal's bonds are broken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਸਭਿ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜ ॥
lines.translit: cheet aavai taan sabh dukh bhanj |
lines.english: When He comes to mind, then all my pains are shattered.
When He comes to mind, then I am in supreme bliss.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਝੂਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: cheet aavai taan kabeh na jhooree |1|
lines.english: When He comes to mind, I never feel sadness. ||1||
Deep within my being, my Sovereign Lord King has revealed Himself to me.
When He comes to mind, my hopes are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਦੀਓ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai deeo rang laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has inspired me to love Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਸਰਬ ਕੋ ਰਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: cheet aavai taan sarab ko raajaa |
lines.english: When He comes to mind, I am the king of all.
When He comes to mind, all my affairs are completed.
When He comes to mind, I am ecstatic forever. ||2||
When He comes to mind, I am dyed in the deep crimson of His Love.
When He comes to mind, I am wealthy forever.
When He comes to mind, I am rid of fear. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਸਭਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: cheet aavai taan sabh rang maane |
lines.english: When He comes to mind, then I enjoy all pleasures.
When He comes to mind, I am free of doubt forever.
When He comes to mind, I continually sing the Kirtan of His Praises.
When He comes to mind, I am absorbed in the Primal Void of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਸਹਜ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: cheet aavai taan sehaj ghar paaeaa |
lines.english: When He comes to mind, I find the home of peace and poise.
My Father is Eternal, forever alive.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak's mind is pleased and satisfied with the Lord God. ||4||8||21||
My brothers live forever as well.
My family abides in the home of the self within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਾਂ ਸਭਹਿ ਸੁਹੇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: ham sukh paaeaa taan sabheh suhele |
lines.english: I have found peace, and so all are at peace.
My friends are permanent and imperishable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੇਲੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai pitaa sang mele |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has united me with my Father. ||1||Pause||
My countries are infinite and uncountable.
My mansions are the highest of all.
My wealth is inexhaustible and permanent. ||2||
My glorious reputation resounds throughout the ages.
My kingdom is eternally stable.
My fame has spread in all places and interspaces.
My praises echo in each and every house.
My devotional worship is known to all people. ||3||
My Father has revealed Himself within me.
Says Nanak, when my Father is pleased,
The Father and son have joined together in partnership.
then the Father and son are joined together in love, and become one. ||4||9||22||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The True Guru, the Primal Being, is free of revenge and hate; He is God, the Great Giver.
I am a sinner; You are my Forgiver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਾਪੀ ਕਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਨ ਢੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis paapee kau milai na dtoee |
lines.english: That sinner, who finds no protection anywhere
- if he comes seeking Your Sanctuary, then he becomes immaculate and pure. ||1||
Pleasing the True Guru, I have found peace.
I humbly bow to the Supreme Lord God, the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: man tan teraa sabh teraa des |
lines.english: My mind and body are Yours; all the world is Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰੂ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh fal paae guroo dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Guru, I have obtained all fruits and rewards. ||1||Pause||
When it pleases Him, even dry wood becomes green.
You are my Lord and Master; You are the King of all. ||2||
When the veil of illusion is removed, then I come to see You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਤਾਂ ਥਲ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis bhaanaa taan thal sir sariaa |
lines.english: When it pleases Him, rivers flow across the desert sands.
Grasping hold of the Guru's feet, my anxiety is dispelled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਤਾਂ ਸਭਿ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tis bhaanaa taan sabh fal paae |
lines.english: When it pleases Him, all fruits and rewards are obtained.
